scripts.server: vp run build:css && vp exec wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.build: vp run build:css && vp exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --dry-run --outdir dist
scripts.preview: vp run build && vp exec wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc --local
scripts.deploy: vp run build:css && vp exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:upload: vp run build:css && vp exec wrangler versions upload --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:promote: vp exec wrangler versions deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --yes
scripts.type: vp run cf-typegen && vp exec tsgo --noEmit
